ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the health condition (e.g., Mental Health Disorder, Alcohol Use Disorder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health condition (e.g., mental health, physical health) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the health condition (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type (e.g., without_children, with_only_children, unknown_household_type) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "description_short" TEXT /* Brief summary of the household type */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Average size of the household type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_data" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey data entry */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health condition being tracked */,
  "total_respondents" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents */,
  "adults_in_hh_with_children_and_adults" INTEGER /* Number of adults in households with both children and adults */,
  "children_in_hh_with_children_and_adults" INTEGER /* Number of children in households with both children and adults */,
  "population_type" TEXT /* Type of population (e.g., start, end) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific question asked in the survey */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of household */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of respondents for the specific condition and household type */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score (0-100) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Data collection method (e.g., online survey, phone survey, in-person survey) */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Response rate for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES health_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_code" TEXT /* Code of the question used in surveys */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended, rating scale) */,
  "question_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the question (e.g., mental health, demographics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_data ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_data ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_data ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., CSV, Excel, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES survey_data ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "survey_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the survey */,
  "survey_population" TEXT /* Target population for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "survey_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey-question relationship */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "question_weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the question for analysis purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
